title: Claude Fable 5 + YouTube = $30,000/mo
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates a YouTube channel monetization system using Claude Code Fable 5 for automated video editing. The workflow involves analyzing high-performing channels, scripting with Claude, recording voiceovers, and using Higsfield CLI to automate editing and composition, claiming production costs around $2 per video.
writeup: Jack Roberts walks through a YouTube monetization workflow built around Claude Code Fable 5 for automated video editing. The process covers analyzing high-performing channels, scripting with Claude, recording voiceovers, and using the Higsfield CLI to automate editing and composition. Roberts claims production costs of around $2 per video and frames the system around a $30,000 per month earnings target.
